name: ArrSuite
description: Installs a selectable group of Arr applications, including Sonarr, Radarr, Lidarr, Prowlarr, Byparr, and FlareSolverr, into one LXC and manages them through a shared add-and-update command.

notes.text: The selected applications share one LXC, one backup boundary, and one failure domain.
Prowlarr, Byparr, and FlareSolverr are currently available only on amd64; Sonarr, Radarr, and Lidarr also support arm64.
Use 'arrsuite add' to install another supported application and 'update' to update every installed application.
